title: cotula longipes
intro: Cotula longipes, also known as Long-stalked Cotula, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which can help in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Cotula longipes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate sinus congestion, and soothe irritated skin. Cotula longipes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
